CustomObject.description: Platform Event that mirrors a neighbour's Contact identity (FirstName, LastName, Email) onto their linked community User. The subscriber (FimbyUserSyncEventTrigger -> FimbyUserSyncEventHandler) runs as the Automated Process user, so the User.Email write is NOT treated as a self-service email change and therefore is not held pending email-confirmation. Published from FimbyProfileController after the Contact update commits.
CustomObject.label: Fimby User Sync Event
